query: SELECT ticker, outcome, exitReason, COUNT(*) as trades, ROUND(AVG(CAST(roiPct AS DECIMAL(10,2))),2) as avgRoi, ROUND(SUM(CAST(profitLoss AS DECIMAL(12,2))),0) as totalPnl FROM labTrades WHERE simulationId = 810001 GROUP BY ticker, outcome ORDER BY totalPnl DESC LIMIT 20;
